name: Navbar
description: A responsive navigation bar with logo, menu items, dropdown menus, mobile hamburger menu, and optional CTA button. Supports sticky positioning and scroll-based transparency effects.
whenToUse: Use as the primary navigation component at the top of every page. Essential for all website templates.

props.name: logo
props.description: Logo element displayed on the left

props.name: items
props.description: Array of navigation items with label, href, and optional children for dropdowns

props.name: ctaButton
props.description: Optional CTA button on the right side

props.name: sticky
props.description: Whether the navbar sticks to the top on scroll

props.name: transparent
props.description: Whether to start with a transparent background
